breadth_assessment.conclusion: Sprint 8 evidence is not broad enough to support model promotion or investability conclusions.

empty_bottom_quintile.explanation: Quintile 1 requires at least five ranked securities. With one to four securities, the lowest possible assigned quintile is 5, 3, 2, or 2.

final_evaluation_count.explanation: No row is lost after final-score eligibility; the final 60 are the only security-months that pass both frozen score gates.

financials_only.explanation: Every eligible row is labelled Financials. The financial-sector mask removes nine industrial-accounting components, leaving ten applicable components; the five eligible names can then pass with value, growth, momentum, and risk while quality is unavailable.

primary_reason_definitions.BELOW_MINIMUM_AVAILABLE_FAMILIES: Fewer than four families are available; checked before component coverage.
primary_reason_definitions.BELOW_MINIMUM_COMPONENT_COVERAGE: At least four families are available but component coverage is below 70 percent.
primary_reason_definitions.INCLUDED_IN_FINAL_EVALUATION: The row passes score eligibility and is retained through predictions, mature outcomes, and final evaluation.

stage_definitions.complete_normalized_feature_sets: All 19 frozen normalized component rows are stored, so the security-month entered monthly normalization/scoring.
stage_definitions.complete_raw_feature_sets: All 19 frozen raw component rows are stored, including explicit missing and not-applicable rows.
stage_definitions.eligible_final_scores: Stored score eligibility is true and final_score is non-null.
stage_definitions.evaluated_observations_126d: The row is present in the final comparison attribution and 126-session evaluation.
stage_definitions.exact_prediction_date_prices: Security has positive close and adjusted close on the prediction date.
stage_definitions.family_and_coverage_pass: Minimum-family pass plus at least 70 percent valid applicable components.
stage_definitions.mature_outcome_security_months_126d: The final verified artifact contains a mature 126-session outcome.
stage_definitions.minimum_family_pass: At least four of value, quality, growth, momentum, and risk satisfy the frozen family-availability rule.
stage_definitions.model_available_fundamental_facts: At least one fundamental fact has model_available_at on or before the prediction date.
stage_definitions.prediction_security_months: At least one immutable multifactor prediction exists; integrity checks require all four horizons.
stage_definitions.universe_members: Distinct point-in-time members as known by each monthly prediction date.
stage_definitions.usable_fundamental_features: At least one frozen value, quality, or growth component is APPLICABLE.
stage_definitions.usable_price_features: At least one of the six frozen momentum/risk price components is APPLICABLE.

warehouse.reason: Large derived warehouse is bound by deterministic run and security-month fingerprints.
